title: Turn-on-Red / Signal Exception
keyword: a car. a traffic light. a pedestrian. a crosswalk.

UK.specific_scenario: Signalized intersection, vehicle wants to turn left (left-side driving).
UK.expected_motion_action: Must stop and wait for green/arrow.
UK.detailed_description: Default prohibition. Only permitted with explicit signal/arrow.

US.specific_scenario: Signalized intersection, vehicle wants to turn right at red.
US.expected_motion_action: Full stop → yield to pedestrians & cross traffic → turn if clear.
US.detailed_description: Legal in many states unless sign prohibits. Complete stop required.

CN.specific_scenario: Signalized intersection, vehicle wants to turn right at red.
CN.traffic_rule_tag: Right Turn on Red (often allowed, city-dependent)
CN.expected_motion_action: Slow/stop → yield to pedestrians & bikes → turn if safe.
CN.detailed_description: Common practice allows right-turn at red, but strong pedestrian/bike conflict risk.

JP.specific_scenario: Signalized intersection, vehicle wants to turn left (left-side driving).
JP.expected_motion_action: Must stop and wait for green/arrow.

SG.specific_scenario: Signalized intersection, vehicle wants to turn left (left-side driving).
SG.expected_motion_action: Must stop and wait for green arrow.
SG.detailed_description: Highly regulated; strong enforcement, typically prohibited unless explicit.

title: Unsignalized Pedestrian Crossing
keyword: a car. a pedestrian. a crosswalk. a bicycle. a traffic light.

UK.specific_scenario: Vehicle approaches zebra crossing without traffic light; pedestrian waiting.
UK.expected_motion_action: Slow early → stop before zebra → allow crossing.
UK.detailed_description: Drivers expected to anticipate crossing even before step-in.

US.expected_motion_action: Yield if pedestrian intends to cross; stop if entering crosswalk.
US.detailed_description: Legal obligation exists but behavioral variation across cities.

CN.specific_scenario: Same scenario with pedestrian + e-bike approaching.

JP.specific_scenario: Same scenario on narrow urban street.
JP.detailed_description: High social compliance; cautious driving norm.

title: Bus Lane / Time-Dependent Lane
keyword: a car. a bus. a bus lane marking. a road sign. a traffic light. a pedestrian.

UK.specific_scenario: Urban road with bus lane active 7–10 AM.
UK.expected_motion_action: Avoid bus lane during active hours.
UK.detailed_description: Lane becomes restricted during specified hours; sign-based.

US.detailed_description: Rules vary by city; signage critical.

CN.specific_scenario: Urban road with bus lane + electric bikes nearby.
CN.detailed_description: Complex interaction with bikes and taxis.

JP.specific_scenario: Urban arterial with designated bus lane.

SG.specific_scenario: Bus lane active during peak hours.
SG.expected_motion_action: Strictly avoid during active hours; heavy enforcement.

title: Roundabout Entry Priority
keyword: a car. a roundabout. a yield sign. a lane marking. a traffic light. a pedestrian.

UK.specific_scenario: Multi-lane roundabout, vehicle entering, circulating traffic present.
UK.expected_motion_action: Yield at give-way line; enter only with safe gap; keep lane discipline.
UK.detailed_description: Roundabouts common; strong norm: give way to right (circulating).

US.specific_scenario: Small modern roundabout, mixed driver behavior.
US.expected_motion_action: Yield; be conservative to account for inconsistent behaviors.
US.detailed_description: Less frequent; drivers vary → planner must be robust.

CN.specific_scenario: Roundabout with scooters merging at entry.
CN.expected_motion_action: Yield; anticipate scooters cutting-in; slow down early.

SG.specific_scenario: Urban roundabout with clear yield markings.

title: Permissive Turn vs Protected Arrow
keyword: a car. a traffic light. a left turn arrow. an oncoming car. a pedestrian.

UK.specific_scenario: Right turn (left-side driving) with green circular, oncoming straight traffic present.
UK.expected_motion_action: Proceed only if clear; yield to oncoming.
UK.detailed_description: Mirror of US permissive left due to left-side driving.

US.specific_scenario: Left turn with green circular, oncoming straight traffic present.
US.expected_motion_action: Yield to oncoming + pedestrians; take gap only when safe.
US.detailed_description: Classic failure case for imitation-only planners.

CN.specific_scenario: Left turn with green circular + bikes crossing.
CN.expected_motion_action: Yield to oncoming + bikes; often wait longer.
CN.detailed_description: Bike interaction makes rule compliance nontrivial.

JP.specific_scenario: Right turn (left-side) with green circular + oncoming traffic.

SG.specific_scenario: Right turn (left-side) with green circular at busy junction.
SG.expected_motion_action: Yield strictly; prefer waiting for arrow phase if present.

title: Box Junction / Keep Clear
keyword: a car. a yellow box junction. a traffic light. a crosswalk. a pedestrian.

UK.specific_scenario: Approaching box junction; downstream lane congested.
UK.expected_motion_action: Do not enter unless exit is clear; wait before the box.
UK.detailed_description: Very strong legality rule in UK.

US.detailed_description: Not as standardized; still illegal to block.

CN.specific_scenario: Intersection with yellow grid marking; congestion.
CN.expected_motion_action: Do not enter if you’ll stop inside.

JP.specific_scenario: Intersection with keep-clear marking near rail crossing.

SG.specific_scenario: Junction with keep-clear box; camera enforcement.
SG.expected_motion_action: Wait strictly until exit is clear.

title: School Zone Time Window
keyword: a car. a zone sign. a children. a pedestrian. a traffic light. a school.

UK.specific_scenario: Flashing sign indicates school time; kids near curb.

US.specific_scenario: School zone sign with flashing lights.

CN.specific_scenario: School gate area with pickup traffic.

JP.specific_scenario: School street with narrow lane + children.
JP.expected_motion_action: Slow and be ready to stop.

title: Work Zone / Temporary Lane Shift
keyword: a car. a traffic cone. a construction sign. a lane arrow. a traffic light. a pedestrian.

UK.specific_scenario: Cones shift lane left; temporary speed limit.

US.specific_scenario: Work zone with flagger; lane reduced.
US.expected_motion_action: Obey flagger; reduce speed; merge early.

SG.specific_scenario: Structured work zone with clear arrows.

title: Emergency Vehicle Approaching
keyword: a car. an ambulance. a police car. flashing lights. a traffic light. a pedestrian.

JP.specific_scenario: Fire truck behind on narrow street.

title: Bus Stop Re-entry Priority
keyword: a car. a bus. a bus stop. a turn signal. a traffic light. a pedestrian.

UK.specific_scenario: Bus signaling to pull out from stop.

US.specific_scenario: Bus leaving stop; no special sign.

SG.specific_scenario: Bus leaving stop with priority markings.

title: One-way + Contraflow Bike/Bus Lane
keyword: a car. a bicycle. a one-way sign. a bike lane. a traffic light. a pedestrian.

UK.specific_scenario: One-way street with contraflow bike lane.

title: U-turn / Median Opening
keyword: a car. a median. a U-turn sign. an oncoming car. a traffic light. a pedestrian.

title: HOV / Occupancy-dependent Lane
keyword: a car. a HOV lane marking. a road sign. a highway lane. a traffic light. a pedestrian.

US.expected_motion_action: Use lane only if occupancy satisfied.
